goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'mutliple sports' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 17:00'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of mutliple sports and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of nightclub
Make sure you get phone number and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 17:00
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from bishops stortford
Make sure you get arrival time
